description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build&Release that triggers on push events with tags 'v*' or 'V*'. The workflow has three jobs: build-windows, build-android, and release-pkg. The build-windows job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for different targets, architectures, editions, compilers, and exclusions. It checks out the repository, installs packages, and runs a PowerShell script to build the project. The build-android job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix strategy for different editions and exclusions. It sets up the Android NDK, checks out the repository, and runs a shell script to build the project. The release-pkg job depends on the build-windows and build-android jobs, downloads the artifacts, and creates a release with the build artifacts.
